southneuhof
projectsclient work

Toll Road Operations Management

Integrated enterprise system for toll road operations and maintenance, moving fragmented daily operations across multiple managed road sections into structured digital workflows.

Supports field execution coordination, real-time reporting, workforce activity tracking, and executive visibility.

Project & Maintenance Governance

Internal governance system developed for a major infrastructure operator. Brings administrative, planning, budgeting, and supervision workflows into one application.

Tracks execution milestones, EHS compliance, system handover, billing, and routine maintenance tasks in a structured enterprise application.

Enterprise QHSSE Management

Company-wide QHSSE management platform that turns quality control, safety compliance, incident reporting, work permits, emergency readiness, and operational risk mitigation into digital workflows.

Includes structured internal forms for field reporting, clear accountability chains, an integrated knowledge support database, and executive visibility dashboards.

ISO & Compliance Governance

Enterprise governance system for ISO compliance, moving compliance tasks out of scattered documents and manual spreadsheet follow-ups into a central dashboard.

Covers record control, internal audit coordination, management oversight, cross-unit accountability tracking, and integration with existing corporate directories.

Corporate Web Presence

Designed and built fast landing pages, campaign pages, and corporate profile systems for clients in food distribution, infrastructure operations, and real estate.

Used modern frameworks with clear design guardrails, while leaving room for each client brand to feel distinct.

Public Information Portal

Enterprise public information system with a public portal and an internal dashboard for disclosure management.

Handles request processing, physical and digital record tracking, review steps, and corporate single sign-on.

Contract & Claim Management

Enterprise contract lifecycle and claim management platform. Designed to standardize drafting, verification, approval routing, amendment history, and legal claim tracking workflows for infrastructure sub-contracts.

Includes approval workflows, audit logs, and integration with organization's various internal systems.

Customer Relationship Management

Commercial records platform for a construction-sector organization, organizing company contacts, market opportunities, project references, tender material, and contract files in one internal system.

Also supports structured questionnaires and marketing review records, giving teams a shared place to track pre-contract information and related documents.

On-Demand Property Services Platform

Two-sided on-demand marketplace connecting commercial and residential property owners with certified technicians for routine maintenance and climate-control (HVAC) inspections.

Built under a state-owned infrastructure conglomerate to keep service quality consistent across independent providers. The platform pairs a high-concurrency consumer booking app with a partner workflow tool for technician dispatch, logistics, and payout management.

PPP Feasibility Suite

Enterprise planning and project monitoring suite for Public-Private Partnership (PPP) programs. Built to support early-stage assessment, governance review, and portfolio oversight.

Combines feasibility modeling, decision review, progress tracking, and reporting workflows in one controlled internal platform.

Knowledge & Readiness Platform

Central knowledge management and personnel readiness platform. It brings training materials, regulatory guidelines, and compliance courses into one web application.

Runs readiness assessments, progress tracking charts, and structured knowledge retrieval for high-concurrency training exercises.
